creator: asmodai@wxs.nl
text:
Doug / Brian,

I saw this old pr about the ppp docs which Doug one time had up on
the URL provided in the PR.

Can the two of you evaluate the current docs on ppp and either close this
pr saying its sufficient wrt the original pr, or else look at what needs
to be done and either fix it yerself or pass the information along to me
so something can be done about this?

Thanks,

-- 
Jeroen Ruigrok van der Werven                          asmodai(at)wxs.nl
The BSD Programmer's Documentation Project <http://home.wxs.nl/~asmodai>
Network/Security Specialist        BSD: Technical excellence at its best
He laughs best that laughs last.
